productDisplayName: Vishudh Women Printed Dark Grey Kurta
description: "Inactivated on 11th Apr,2012, mail by Vishwanath Gopalkrishnan because of  "As a part of the annual stock correction we need to send 1890 pcs from vishudh back to the brand" Composition Dark grey printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, dark grey yoke with stitch detailing, three quarter sleeves and dark grey tape with stitch detailing along the cuffs and vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The stitch and tape detailing along the hem and cuffs adds a subtle contrast to the busy print of the kurta. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
